strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum tenure requirement.
Strong entrepreneurial and open-source background, evidenced by founding and maintaining the GISCollective platform.
Proven ability to inspire and educate others through organizing Refactoring Dojos and leading technical workshops like FOSS4G and Web Internals.
concerns: AI experience is limited to a recent role at re:cinq, falling short of the 'recognized expertise in AI' preferred qualification.
Lacks Director-level individual contributor experience involving strategic advisory for enterprise customers.
Does not hold the preferred Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field.
response.justification: The role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and cloud platforms to advise strategic customers. While Bogdan has over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and excellent entrepreneurial traits (evidenced by founding GISCollective), his AI experience is limited to recent tooling work at re:cinq. Furthermore, his background lacks the high-level strategic advisory experience required for this Director-level individual contributor position. Because the core requirement of AI strategy is largely unmet, he is not recommended for this role.
